project.title: Automated Technical Reporting with Computer Vision
project.subtitle: Computer vision system for automatic identification of slickline tools in the oil and gas industry, with deep learning classification and interactive interface.
project.description: Machine learning application designed to automatically identify slickline tools in photographs from the oil and gas industry. The system uses computer vision and deep learning to classify unlabeled images of downhole equipment, automating integrity inspection documentation and significantly reducing technical report generation time.

pipeline_steps.title: Image Collection
pipeline_steps.description: Acquisition of slickline tool photographs from NDT inspections using penetrant liquids and ultraviolet light

pipeline_steps.title: Data Preparation
pipeline_steps.description: Organization, cleaning, and labeling of images for classification model training

pipeline_steps.title: Preprocessing
pipeline_steps.description: Normalization, resizing, and image augmentation to improve model generalization

pipeline_steps.title: Model Training
pipeline_steps.description: Deep learning model training for tool classification with GPU support

pipeline_steps.title: Evaluation
pipeline_steps.description: Model validation with confusion matrix and per-category precision metrics

pipeline_steps.title: Prediction
pipeline_steps.description: Prediction generation with confidence scores on unclassified images

pipeline_steps.title: Web Interface
pipeline_steps.description: Streamlit application for image upload and real-time classification

pipeline_steps.title: Deployment
pipeline_steps.description: Docker containerization for reproducible execution with GPU support

key_features.title: Automatic Classification
key_features.description: Automatic identification of multiple slickline tool types: centralizers, pulling tools, valves, and downhole equipment.

key_features.title: Interactive Interface
key_features.description: Streamlit web application for image upload and real-time classification result visualization.

key_features.title: NDT Inspection
key_features.description: Processing of images from non-destructive testing with penetrant liquids and ultraviolet light.

key_features.title: Automated Reports
key_features.description: Automatic generation of technical reports linking visual evidence with tool databases.
